$schema_note: Phase 4A renovated-ARV uplift model. Used when RentCast's comp set represents AS-IS market value (Detroit/Memphis pattern — distressed wholesale flips dominate within search radius, renovated retail isn't in the response). Formula: ARV_renovated = ARV_as-is + (rehab_mid × multiplier). Per-market multipliers are working assumptions — refine against closed retail-renovated comps.
source: Alex 5/12 walkthrough — Sturtevant validation ($51,548 + $45K × 2.0 = $141,548 vs. Briyana boots-on-ground $145K, 2.4% delta)

_default._note: Unknown markets default to data_state=renovated (no uplift fires); 1.5× multiplier applies only if a future operator flips this market to data_state=as_is

48._note: RentCast comp radius rarely contains renovated retail. Uplift fires whenever condition_target ∈ {good, renovated}. Validated against Sturtevant on 5/12.

38._note: Same bimodal market as Detroit per briefing §14 #5. Uplift fires by default.

78._note: RentCast comp set typically represents renovated retail (validated by Highland $208K landing in $200-225K target band). Uplift does NOT fire unimodal — would over-count. Multiplier kept for the rare bimodal Detroit-style ZIP within SA.

75._note: Same as SA — healthy retail market, comp cluster is renovated.

77._note: Same as SA — healthy retail market, comp cluster is renovated.
